item.title: 安全云 - Linode + DEV 黑客马拉松 | Safe Cloud - Linode + DEV Hackathon
item.description:
扫码支付

允许用户通过 QRcode 支付的应用程序。

类别提交：

  • 集成创新者
  • 古怪的通配符

应用链接

应用程序尚未就绪

截图

描述

我们了解到，中央银行与支付政策之间的持续争论使尼日利亚人处于困境。 这就是为什么我们开发了一个独特且易于使用的支付平台来解决尼日利亚的支付挑战。

由于近乎无现金政策，最近用户激增，尼日利亚的银行结构和网络无法跟上。 但 ScanPAY 提供了一种可扩展的支付结构，可以满足从工匠和市场女性到日常用户的每个人的需求。

我们简单可靠的支付网关允许对发送方和接收方进行即时验证，从而使交易快速无缝。 我们的平台提供了一个简单的验证模型，可以轻松跟踪付款和警报，因此您永远不必担心虚假警报或退回交易。

在 ScanPAY，我们相信技术的力量可以让每个人的生活更轻松。 加入我们，体验便捷、安全、无忧的支付新时代。

链接到源代码

许可许可

背景

其他资源/信息

成为一名现代 React 开发人员并不仅仅是了解 React 本身。 为了保持竞争力，强烈建议探索整个生态系统。 本文包含一些最有用的 React 组件库，可加快您的开发人员工作流程。

一旦暂停，scofieldidehen 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，scofieldidehen 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，scofieldidehen 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 scofieldidehen 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 scofieldidehen：

降低 scofieldidehen 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging scofieldidehen will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning scofieldidehen 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

ScanPay

An application that allows user to pay via QRcode.

Category Submission:

  • SaaS Superstars
  • Integration Innovators
  • Wacky Wildcard

App Link

App is not ready

Screenshots

Description

ScanPAY, the solution to Nigeria's cashless policy problem!

We understand that the constant debate between the central bank and payment policies has put Nigerians in a difficult position. That's why we've developed a unique and easy-to-use payment platform that solves Nigeria's payment challenges.

With the recent surge in users due to the near cashless policy, Nigeria's banking structure and network have not been able to keep up. But ScanPAY offers a scalable payment structure that meets the needs of everyone, from artisans and market women to everyday users.

Our easy and reliable payment gateway allows for instant verification for both the sender and receiver, making transactions fast and seamless. Our platform provides an easy verification model that allows for easy tracking of payments and alerts, so you never have to worry about fake alerts or bounced transactions.

At ScanPAY, we believe in the power of technology to make life easier for everyone. Join us and experience a new era of convenient, secure, and hassle-free payments.

Link to Source Code

github.com/Scofield-Idehen/ScanPay.git

Permissive License

Background

Additional Resources/Info

Being a modern React developer is not about knowing just React itself. To stay competitive, it is highly recommended to explore the whole ecosystem. This article contains some of the most useful React component libraries to speed up your developer workflow.

Elijah Trillionz - Feb 13

Fernando González Tostado - Feb 4

Devashish Datt Mamgain - Jan 31

Once suspended, scofieldidehen will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, scofieldidehen will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by scofieldidehen will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If scofieldidehen is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag scofieldidehen:

Make all posts by scofieldidehen less visible

scofieldidehen consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging scofieldidehen will restore default visibility to their posts.
